task_completion.description: Document contains a Title and Project Overview section
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenOffice Writer is open, displaying a document with a main title and a 'Project Overview' section. The text should mention keywords like 'Ridgeline', 'Migration', or 'Data Center'.

task_completion.description: Auto-generated Table of Contents is present
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents section is visible in the document, typically featuring a gray background or dotted leader lines connecting headings to page numbers.

task_completion.description: Page numbers are included in the footer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom of the document pages in OpenOffice Writer shows a footer area containing page numbers.

task_completion.description: Sections are organized using Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sections such as 'Business Case', 'Scope', 'Objectives', 'Stakeholders', 'Milestones', 'Budget', and 'Risks' are formatted with distinct, larger heading styles (Heading 1 and Heading 2) rather than normal text.

task_completion.description: Formatted tables are created for Stakeholders, Milestones, Budget, and Risks
task_completion.visual_evidence: Grid-like tables with borders and cells are visible, containing project data such as stakeholder names, milestone dates, budget figures (e.g., 4,200,000), and risk descriptions.

task_completion.description: Document is saved with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window displays 'Ridgeline_DC_Migration_Charter.odt' or the file is visible in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory in a file manager.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with OpenOffice Writer menus, toolbars, or dialog boxes (e.g., inserting tables, updating TOC, modifying headers/footers) rather than using a terminal script to generate the ODT file.

integrity.description: Tables are genuine word processor tables
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables in the document have actual cell structures and borders, rather than being plain text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Agent extracted data from the provided JSON file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen opening, viewing, or copying from '/home/ga/Documents/project_data.json' in a text editor or terminal to populate the document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/Ridgeline_DC_Migration_Charter.odt. It should contain at least 7 Heading 1s, 6 Heading 2s, and 4 tables. It must include an auto-generated Table of Contents and footer page numbers. Content should include keywords: Ridgeline, Migration, Data Center, AWS, 4,200,000, Markley.
